name: refuse_low_reliability
description: Borderline scope, runs but all domains below reliability threshold. Post-execution LOW_RELIABILITY. NOTE: This case is hard to trigger deterministically with mocks because interpret_situation filters low-reliability domains before routing. The expected behavior is borderline scope with degraded output.
query: What aesthetic style suits my apartment renovation?
